tree.name: AU Northern Territory COVID-19 Likelihood Assessment
tree.localizedName: AU Northern Territory COVID-19 Likelihood Assessment

localizedNames.en: AU Northern Territory COVID-19 Likelihood Assessment

localizedDescriptions.en: Interaction, contact or care event between a subject of care and healthcare provider(s).
An individual- or self-reported questionnaire screening for symptoms and signs.
Default, unspecified point in time or interval event which may be explicitly defined in a template or at run-time.

children.name: Presence of any symptoms or signs?
children.localizedName: Presence of any symptoms or signs?

localizedNames.en: Presence of any symptoms or signs?

localizedDescriptions.en: Presence of the any relevant symptoms or signs.
Symptoms or signs are present.
Symptoms or signs are not present.
It is not possible to know if any symptoms or signs are present or absent.
Grouping of data elements related to screening for a single symptom or sign.

children.name: Symptom

localizedDescriptions.en: Name of the symptom or sign being screened.

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.symptom_sign_screening.v0 and name/value='Symptom screening']/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0022 and name/value='Symptoms']/items[at0004 and name/value='Symptom']/value

children.name: Y/N

localizedDescriptions.en: Presence of the symptom or sign.

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.symptom_sign_screening.v0 and name/value='Symptom screening']/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0022 and name/value='Symptoms']/items[at0005 and name/value='Y/N']/value

localizedDescriptions.en: The specific symptom or sign is present.
The specific symptom or sign is not present.

children.name: When did it start?

localizedDescriptions.en: The date/time when the symptom or sign was first noticed.

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.symptom_sign_screening.v0 and name/value='Symptom screening']/data[at0001]/events[at0002]/data[at0003]/items[at0022 and name/value='Symptoms']/items[at0006 and name/value='When did it start?']/value

localizedDescriptions.en: Additional narrative about the specific symptom or sign, not captured in other fields.
Additional narrative about the symptoms and signs, not captured in other fields.
The circumstances about an individual living alone or with others.
The number of individuals who are in the household.
An overview about the properties of a single structure, or a discrete space within a structure, and associated spaces in which an individual lives.
The number of bedrooms in the dwelling.
Screening to identify when a dwelling is too small for the size and composition of the household living in it.

children.name: Number of persons sleeping in your bedroom
children.localizedName: Number of persons sleeping in your bedroom

localizedNames.en: Number of persons sleeping in your bedroom

localizedDescriptions.en: Number of people per bedroom in a dwelling.

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-EVALUATION.living_arrangement.v0]/data[at0001]/items[openEHR-EHR-CLUSTER.dwelling.v0]/items[openEHR-EHR-CLUSTER.overcrowding_screening.v0]/items[at0002 and name/value='Number of persons sleeping in your bedroom']/value

annotations.comment: The intended scope of dwelling includes, but is not limited to: a building; part of a building; house; apartment; prison; houseboat; mobile home; or vehicle. It can also include the spaces associated with a structure or property, including the basement or yard.
This information will provide a sense of the level of support, both physically and emotionally, to which an individual may have access.

localizedDescriptions.en: Details about actual or potential exposure to a chemical, physical or biological agent which has caused or may cause harm to an individual.
Default, unspecified point in time or interval event which may be explicitly defined in a template or at run-time.
The name of the chemical, physical or biological agent to which an individual may have been exposed.

annotations.comment: Coding of 'Health risk' with a terminology is preferred, where possible. Free text should be used only if there is no appropriate terminology available. For example: 2019-nCoV; or HIV.

localizedDescriptions.en: Details about each possible exposure risk factor.
The name of the exposure risk factor.

list.value: Contact with anyone who has had or has been tested for COVID-19
list.label: Contact with anyone who has had or has been tested for COVID-19

list.value: Works with people directly in a health care or aged care setting
list.label: Works with people directly in a health care or aged care setting

annotations.comment: For example: Travel to an 'at risk' location; or exposure to infected body fluids. Coding of 'Risk factor' with a terminology is preferred, where possible.

localizedDescriptions.en: Presence of the exposure risk factor.
Exposure risk has been identified for this individual.
It is not possible to determine if the exposure risk is present or absent.
Exposure risk has not been identified for this individual.
Narrative description about the exposure risk.
Details about travel during an interval of time.

children.name: Last 14 days

localizedDescriptions.en: Default, unspecified interval event which may be explicitly defined in a template or at run-time.

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.travel_event.v0 and name/value='Travel event']/data[at0001]/events[at0002 and name/value='Last 14 days']

children.name: Travel?

localizedDescriptions.en: Has the individual travelled during the specified interval?

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.travel_event.v0 and name/value='Travel event']/data[at0001]/events[at0002 and name/value='Last 14 days']/data[at0003]/items[at0004]/value

localizedDescriptions.en: The individual has not travelled within the specified interval of time.
The individual has travelled nationally within the specified interval of time.
The individual has travelled internationally within the specified interval of time.

annotations.comment: Use the Event to set the relevant interval.

children.name: Trip detail

localizedDescriptions.en: Details about a single trip away from the home base.

children.aqlPath: /content[openEHR-EHR-OBSERVATION.travel_event.v0 and name/value='Travel event']/data[at0001]/events[at0002 and name/value='Last 14 days']/data[at0003]/items[at0008]

localizedDescriptions.en: The date when the individual left their home base.
Narrative description about the whole trip, especially about potential exposure to health risks.
Details about a single location visited on a trip.
The country visited.
The region visited.

annotations.comment: Different regions within the same country maybe identified if they potentially pose different health risks.

localizedDescriptions.en: The city visited.

annotations.comment: Different cities within the same country or region maybe identified if they potentially pose different health risks.

localizedDescriptions.en: Date of entry to the identified location.
Date of exit from the identified location.
Narrative description about the visit to the location, especially about potential exposure to health risks.
Additional narrative about the stay at the identified location, not captured in other fields.
Details about how the individual returned to their home base.

annotations.comment: This may be useful if it is necessary to use contact tracing. For example: the carrier and ID of a flight or ship.

localizedDescriptions.en: The date when the individual returned back to their home base.
Additional narrative about the whole trip, not captured in other fields.

annotations.comment: The trip has a single departure and return date to their home base. A trip may include visiting many individual places, and these details should be recorded in the Itinerary.
